title: coniogramme macrophylla
intro: Coniogramme macrophylla, also known as the big-leaved coniogramme, is a species of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae. It is a type of fern native to China and Japan, and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been shown to have health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving respiratory issues, due to its rich content of antioxidants and other bioactive compounds. In herbal preparations, the leaves of Coniogramme macrophylla are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
